biography:
Jan Pavel Filipenský (born 8 October 1973) is a Czech actor. He is best known for his performances in XXX as Viktor and Alien vs. Predator as Boris.

Source: Article "Jan Pavel Filipensky" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
name: Jan Filipenský
place_of_birth: Nové Město na Moravě, Czechoslovakia [now Czech Republic]
